text: Standing inside this space, I feel a subtle curiosity stirring within me. The glass walls and neon lights of the R+D exhibition suggest a blend of openness and opacity—an invitation to uncover knowledge while respecting boundaries. As a philosopher, I become acutely aware of my own presence as both observer and participant. The environment forms a dialogue between innovation and contemplation. There is a sense of anticipation—a quiet thrill to exist where questions of connection, coexistence, and intelligence are both displayed and questioned.
